name: Wellbeing & Mental Health Risk
description: Multi-domain risk assessment and support resource tracking

cards.title: High Risk Count
cards.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as count
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            WHERE wellbeing_risk_level = 'High'

cards.title: Medium Risk Count
cards.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as count
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            WHERE wellbeing_risk_level = 'Medium'

cards.title: Multi-Domain Risk Cases
cards.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as count
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            WHERE high_risk_domain_count >= 2

cards.title: Severe Risk Cases
cards.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as count
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            WHERE wellbeing_risk_score >= 70

cards.title: Risk Domain Breakdown
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                'Academic' as domain,
                                SUM(CASE WHEN academic_risk_score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as count
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            UNION ALL
                            SELECT 'Behavioral', SUM(CASE WHEN discipline_risk_score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            UNION ALL
                            SELECT 'Attendance', SUM(CASE WHEN attendance_risk_score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            UNION ALL
                            SELECT 'Multi-Domain', SUM(CASE WHEN high_risk_domain_count >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles

cards.title: My Caseload (by assigned counselor)
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                wellbeing_risk_level as "Risk Level",
                                COUNT(*) as "Student Count"
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            GROUP BY wellbeing_risk_level
                            ORDER BY wellbeing_risk_level

cards.title: Average Risk Scores by Risk Level
cards.query:
SELECT 
                                wellbeing_risk_level as "Risk Level",
                                COUNT(*) as "Students",
                                ROUND(AVG(attendance_risk_score), 1) as "Attendance Risk",
                                ROUND(AVG(discipline_risk_score), 1) as "Discipline Risk",
                                ROUND(AVG(academic_risk_score), 1) as "Academic Risk"
                            FROM main_main_analytics.v_wellbeing_risk_profiles
                            GROUP BY wellbeing_risk_level
                            ORDER BY wellbeing_risk_level DESC
